block_00: Every month is a new chance to show off your trading skills and win as you compete with traders around the world.
block_01: Pick a tournament and join now!
block_29: Part of your payment during the tournament will go to the prize pool. All participating traders will start the tournament with a special account. The balance credited varies by tournament.
block_30: *One will get a share of the prize fund only in case of winning the tournament.
